properties.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(12h)
| summarize Count = count()
| where Count == 0
| extend
    Alert      = "No Vaikora data ingested in the last 12 hours",
    Suggestion = "Check the VaikoraToAzureSecurityCenter Logic App run history and verify the Vaikora API key is valid."
| project Alert, Suggestion
properties.description: Identifies when no Vaikora data has arrived in the Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL table for 12 or more hours, which may indicate a failed playbook, expired API key, or connectivity issue.

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL has received no records in the last 12 hours.

properties.name: Vaikora - Feed outage detection
